title: Jamie Bell Joins New Peaky Blinders Show
summary: A new Peaky Blinders TV series is coming, and actor Jamie Bell will star in it. The show is about a crime family in Birmingham, England, and this new story happens in the 1950s, ten years after the last movie. Jamie Bell will play Duke Shelby, who is the oldest son of Tommy Shelby from the original series. Other actors like Charlie Heaton, Jessica Brown Findlay, and Lashana Lynch are also joining the cast. The series will show how World War Two affected Birmingham and follow Duke as he becomes more ambitious and dangerous. It will be filmed in Birmingham and have two series with six episodes each. You can watch it on BBC iPlayer, BBC One, and Netflix. The creator, Steven Knight, is excited about this new era for Peaky Blinders.

background_read: Peaky Blinders is a famous British TV series that started in 2013. It tells the story of the Shelby family, who are gangsters in Birmingham after World War One. The show has many fans because of its exciting plots and cool characters. The new series will continue the story but jump ahead to the 1950s, showing how things have changed for the family. This helps kids understand how TV shows can have sequels and new actors, making it fun to follow along with favorite stories.
Article_Structure: WHO: Jamie Bell, Charlie Heaton, Jessica Brown Findlay, Lashana Lynch, and other actors
WHAT: A new Peaky Blinders TV series set in the 1950s
WHERE: Birmingham, England, filmed at Digbeth Loc. Studios
WHY: To explore the aftermath of World War Two and continue the Shelby family story

perspectives.description: This new series brings back a beloved show with fresh actors and a new time period, making it exciting for people who love Peaky Blinders.
